name: Sunway Real Estate Investment Trust
summary: Sunway Real Estate Investment Trust is a Malaysia-based real estate investment trust (REIT) that invests in a diversified portfolio of retail, hotel, office, and other properties primarily located in Malaysia. The REIT generates income through rental revenue from its properties. Sunway REIT is managed by Sunway REIT Management Sdn Bhd and is headquartered in Bandar Sunway, Selangor, Malaysia.
